targets.rawSql: SELECT toDateTime(date) AS time, ticker AS metric, count() AS value FROM equity_raw.ohlcv_raw FINAL WHERE $__timeFilter(toDateTime(date)) GROUP BY time, metric ORDER BY time, metric
SELECT toStartOfDay(published_at) AS time, ticker AS metric, count() AS value FROM equity_raw.news_raw FINAL WHERE $__timeFilter(published_at) GROUP BY time, metric ORDER BY time, metric

WITH daily AS (SELECT toDate(published_at) AS day, ticker, count() AS rows FROM equity_raw.news_raw FINAL WHERE published_at >= now() - INTERVAL 45 DAY GROUP BY day, ticker) SELECT time, metric, value FROM (SELECT toDateTime(day) AS time, concat(ticker, ' 7d') AS metric, avg(rows) OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY day ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS value FROM daily UNION ALL SELECT toDateTime(day) AS time, concat(ticker, ' 30d') AS metric, avg(rows) OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY day ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS value FROM daily) ORDER BY time ASC, metric ASC
SELECT now() AS time, ticker AS metric, dateDiff('day', max(period_end), today()) AS value FROM equity_derived.fundamental_summary FINAL GROUP BY metric ORDER BY metric
SELECT toDateTime(date) AS time, ticker AS metric, close AS value FROM equity_raw.ohlcv_raw FINAL WHERE date >= today() - INTERVAL 30 DAY ORDER BY time, metric
